input.command:
echo "########## 1. /Applications/coh ##########"
ls -la /Applications/coh 2>/dev/null || echo "  (not found)"
file /Applications/coh 2>/dev/null
echo
echo "########## 2. /Applications/LaunchCat.app ##########"
ls -la /Applications/LaunchCat.app 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo
echo "########## 3. /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app ##########"
ls -la /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app 2>/dev/null || echo "  (not found)"
echo "--- bundle structure ---"
ls -la /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents 2>/dev/null
echo "--- Info.plist key bits ---"
plutil -p /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents/Info.plist 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'CFBundleName|CFBundleIdentifier|CFBundleShortVersion|CFBundleExecutable|Electron|Minimum' | head -20
input.description: Inspect coh, LaunchCat, and CoHModdingTool apps
